title: Email Domain Restriction
excerpt: Hello Community, I would like to recommend an option that would restrict who submits a form by email domain? For example, only users who have a outlook.com or gmail.com would be able to submit a form.

posts.author: SurgeJ (Sergio Mayorga)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello Community, I would like to recommend an option that would restrict who submits a form by email domain? For example, only users who have a outlook.com or gmail.com would be able to submit a form.
